subject: Eternatus, a large skeletal dragon-like cosmic creature in a dramatic pose
description: A towering, skeletal dragon-like figure dominates the frame against a deep dark background. The creature's form is elongated and angular, with prominent bony protrusions and a ribcage-like torso. Glowing crimson and dark red energy emanates from the core and along its limbs, creating a stark contrast against the near-black background. The creature's head and upper body are oriented upward or outward, conveying an imposing cosmic scale. The overall impression is of a vast, otherworldly entity whose body seems to generate or absorb dark energy. There are no secondary figures — this is pure monumental presence.
foreground: skeletal dragon-like creature with glowing crimson energy core
background: near-black void with faint dark atmospheric haze
